judge_explanation: The AI agent gives a well-supported conclusion with the Likert score calibrated to the strength of the evidence. Multiple models (OLS, SmartAdditiveRegressor, HingeEBMRegressor) validate the null hypothesis, showing no meaningful effect of 'masfem'. The analysis includes control variables such as storm category and damage, and investigates the effects using different modeling approaches, adding depth and robustness. The clarity in the report of non-monotonic effects and model exclusions enhances understanding.
